items.how_used: 使用多元线性回归，以城市人口、高中毕业率、高中辍学率、监狱人口、假释违规百分比为自变量，暴力犯罪发生率为因变量，建立预测模型。

formulas.latex_code: V = \beta_0 + \beta_1 P + \beta_2 G + \beta_3 D + \beta_4 J + \beta_5 R

items.source_excerpt: ran a multivariate linear regression to create a function that outputs an approximate incidence of violence given the City Population, High School Graduation Rate, High School Dropout Rate, Prison Population, and Percent of Parole Violations.

items.how_used: 通过计算每个变量与暴力犯罪发生率的线性回归决定系数（R²）来评估相关性，并筛选出R²较高的五个变量。
items.source_excerpt: we ran linear regressions of all values vs. all other values and outputted the coefficient of determination from each regression.

items.how_used: 对每个回归系数的斜率进行假设检验，检验斜率是否显著不为零，以确认变量对暴力犯罪有预测能力。
items.source_excerpt: we conducted hypothesis tests that would determine the probability that the slope of our regression line was 0.

items.how_used: 对每个变量单独与暴力犯罪进行一元线性回归，初步判断相关性，并发现失业率、青少年囚犯数与暴力犯罪几乎无关。
items.source_excerpt: we ran linear regressions of violence with respect to each value with the statistical analysis software MINITAB.

items.how_used: 用实际数据测试模型，计算预测值与真实值之间的误差范围（15起到小于1起），评估模型准确性。
items.source_excerpt: When we tested this model against data that we already had, there was relatively low error, with discrepancies in incidence of violence ranging from 15 crimes to less than 1 crime.

items.how_used: 通过分析回归系数大小，确定高中毕业率和辍学率对暴力犯罪影响最大，从而将重点放在学校经费上。
items.source_excerpt: we found which variable(s) affected the function most. We found that High School Graduation and Dropout Rates had the biggest effect

items.how_used: 建立学校经费增加百分比与毕业率、辍学率变化之间的函数关系，用于预测经费投入对教育指标的影响。

formulas.latex_code: \Delta G = f(\Delta F), \quad \Delta D = g(\Delta F)

items.source_excerpt: we set out to create a relation which could model increases in graduation rate and decreases in dropout rate as a function of the percent increase in school funding.

items.how_used: 使用MINITAB软件进行线性回归分析，计算决定系数和假设检验，辅助变量筛选。
items.source_excerpt: we ran linear regressions of violence with respect to each value with the statistical analysis software MINITAB.
